name: KASUMI
archetype: fast rushdown with elite whiff punishment
weaknesses: can be checked by patient mid-range play
strat: Play Kasumi as a fast mid-range pest who chips away with quick checks, then explodes once you read a mistake.
matchup_tip: Force opponents to swing first, then whiff punish and carry them toward the wall.

key_moves.name: P (Jab)
key_moves.desc: Fastest check at i9. Use it to interrupt pressure and confirm into strings.

key_moves.name: 6P (Elbow)
key_moves.desc: Fast mid poke with good range. Essential for checking opponents who duck.

key_moves.name: 66K (Rushing Kick)
key_moves.desc: Approach tool with good range. Slightly minus on block but pushes back.

key_moves.name: 4P (Spinning Backfist)
key_moves.desc: Counter-hit launcher. Use it to catch impatient opponents pressing buttons.

key_moves.name: H+K (Axe Kick)
key_moves.desc: Safe mid kick that wall splats. Great ender near the wall.

key_moves.name: 236T (Teleport Throw)
key_moves.desc: Command throw with side switch. Use it after conditioning opponents to block.

matchup_notes.advice: Respect his throw range. Use fast mids to check his approach.
Stay mobile and avoid staying in throw range.
Do not let him set up armored reads.
Challenge her stance transitions with quick mids.

name: HAYABUSA
